title: poa koelzii
intro: Poa koelzii, also known as Koelz's bluegrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Poa koelzii can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being.
